commits.subject: feat(homepage): Refresh Today guidance for activation
commits.body: New copy and hierarchy make the homepage clearer for first-run and returning users.

commits.subject: style(onboarding): Clarify tool connection recovery states
commits.body: Welcome, preflight, and auth handoff screens now explain what is happening when setup needs attention.

commits.subject: fix(files): Stabilise document preview mounting
commits.body: Prevents previews from opening against the wrong workspace mount path.

mocked_llm_completion: "what_youll_see":[{"bullet":"Homepage and onboarding now put clearer guidance up front, so users should see less mystery during first setup.","source_indices":[0,1]}],"what_we_fixed":[{"bullet":"If someone says setup looks different, expect clearer connection and recovery copy instead of a silent dead end.","source_indices":[1]}],"worth_a_look":[{"bullet":"Document previews should open more reliably from the right workspace location.","source_indices":[2]}]}
